creator: samesame@akruijff.dds.nl
text:
- Update to 1.4
	- Features lower memory footprint

Fix: --- Makefile.orig	Thu Aug 20 08:05:34 2009
+++ Makefile	Thu Aug 20 08:07:31 2009
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/samesame/Makefile,v 1.8 2009/07/07 22:08:29 dhn Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	samesame
-PORTVERSION=	1.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.4
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://samesame.kruijff.org/ \
 		${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}
--- Makefile.diff ends here ---
